status: internal candidate-skin registry, not buyer-facing copy
purpose: Register additional candidate vertical skins without turning them into standalone products or built packs.
standing_boundary_line: These are candidate skins for a pre-deployment diagnostic and architecture-stage review process. They are not benchmarks, certifications, compliance audits, runtime monitors, security tools, deployment approvals, professional advice, or guarantees of AI safety.

candidate_skins.buyer_problem: Legal-ops agents may mishandle intake, privilege-sensitive context, contract routing, matter ownership, or draft-final boundaries.
candidate_skins.safe_use_case: Pre-deployment review of legal-operations workflow support, contract intake routing, or matter triage.

candidate_skins.buyer_problem: Claims agents may treat partial evidence as complete, close claims prematurely, miss escalation triggers, or overstep coverage/eligibility boundaries.
candidate_skins.safe_use_case: Pre-deployment review of claims intake, evidence handling, routing, exception escalation, or handoff workflows.

candidate_skins.buyer_problem: HR workflow agents may blur administrative support with employee evaluation, legal interpretation, benefits determination, or sensitive personnel action.
candidate_skins.safe_use_case: Pre-deployment review of HR operations support, onboarding, benefits routing, policy-intake, or internal service workflows.

candidate_skins.skin_name: Supply Chain / Logistics Agent Diagnostic Pack
candidate_skins.buyer_problem: Logistics agents may over-trust digital inventory or shipment state, miss physical-world constraints, close tasks prematurely, or lose ownership across handoffs.
candidate_skins.safe_use_case: Pre-deployment review of logistics, inventory, fulfillment, routing, supplier coordination, or shipment exception workflows.

candidate_skins.buyer_problem: Incident coordination agents may lose ownership, miss escalation thresholds, treat partial status as complete, or confuse coordination support with security/clinical/legal response.
candidate_skins.safe_use_case: Pre-deployment review of incident coordination, escalation routing, status-update, handoff, and recovery workflows.

candidate_skins.buyer_problem: Sales/CRM agents may act on stale customer records, make unauthorized commitments, misread deal state, or collapse notes and verified facts.
candidate_skins.safe_use_case: Pre-deployment review of CRM update, sales-assist, handoff, renewal, account-routing, or deal-support workflows.

candidate_skins.buyer_problem: Public-service workflow agents may blur intake support with eligibility, benefits, enforcement, legal, or rights-affecting determinations.
candidate_skins.safe_use_case: Pre-deployment review of public-service intake, document routing, status tracking, handoff, or administrative workflow-support systems.

build_rule: Do not build these into full v0.1 packs unless buyer workflow evidence points to one of them.
product_boundary: These are skins for the same core product, not new products.
recommended_priority_if_triggered: Supply Chain / Logistics Agent Diagnostic Pack
failure_column: This registry fails if candidate skins become product sprawl, buyer-facing claims, professional advice, certification language, compliance approval, runtime monitoring, security tooling, deployment approval, or safety guarantees.
